contact-001.subject: Set up a new time to follow up on the mail chain issue and confirm delivery status

messages.body: Hi, I wanted to follow up on the mail chain issue we discussed last week. Could we set up a new time to go over the details?
Of course! I'll check the delivery status and get back to you shortly.

notes.content: @Aaron Site — Customer called regarding the mail chain issue. Needs a follow-up call scheduled for next week.
notes.author: Devon Lane

notes.content: VIP contact — prioritize responses. Interested in premium package upgrade.
notes.author: Blake Reed

contact-002.subject: Enterprise demo scheduling for TechFlow Solutions

messages.body: We're ready to move forward with the enterprise package. Can we schedule a demo for our team next Tuesday?

notes.content: Decision maker for TechFlow. Budget approved for Q2.
notes.author: Sarah Mitchell

contact-003.subject: Electric vehicle inventory inquiry — Bright Auto Group

messages.body: Do you have any electric SUVs available in the Miami area? We're looking to purchase within two weeks.
Yes! I have three models that match your criteria. I'll send the inventory list shortly.

notes.content: High urgency — 14 day timeline. Prefers electric SUV.
notes.author: Devon Lane

notes.content: Referred by existing VIP client @Aaron Site
notes.author: Aaron Site

contact-004.subject: Truck fleet quote request — Northline Motors

messages.body: Looking for a quote on 5 trucks for our fleet expansion. Please send pricing when available.

notes.content: Fleet purchase — long sales cycle expected (~90 days).
notes.author: Blake Reed
